command: if [ "$(hostname)" != hnode096 ]; then echo diagnostic_skipped host=$(hostname); exit 0; fi; export GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE=1; git -C /tmp/open-instruct-runtime fetch --depth=1 origin main; git -C /tmp/open-instruct-runtime checkout --force FETCH_HEAD; PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 PYTHONPATH=/tmp/olmo-train-runtime-deps-rl/9bb7f3078dbf50144c181796/userbase/lib/python3.12/site-packages:/tmp/open-instruct-runtime:/tmp/OLMo-core-runtime/src python -c 'import open_instruct.grpo_fast as g; a=g.PolicyTrainerRayProcess; m=a.__ray_metadata__.modified_class; print("module",g.__name__); print("modified_module",m.__module__); print("modified_qualname",m.__qualname__); print("init_module",m.__dict__["__init__"].__module__); print("cli_main",g.cli_main)'
